OVERVIEW
mission

Our mission is to facilitate, produce, and advance opportunities for Minority Business Enterprises (MBE), Emerging
Small Businesses (ESB), and Disadvantaged Business Enterprises (DBE) to successfully participate in the full array of
contracting opportunities available in the City of Richmond by promoting and executing a wide variety of technical
assistance programs.
VISION

Greater economic and social equity in our community through the pursuit of parity in the amount the City of Richmond
spends, as well as opportunities for growth and development through procure goods/services and technical assistance
using taxpayer dollars and user fees.
OBJECTIVES
Increase technical assistance activities to attract, retain and grow businesses
Identify procurement opportunities within the city administration as well as the city’s anchor institutions
Take advantage of the latest technology to enable opportunity and ensure diversity
Assist in the preparation of MBE/ESB with the goal of qualify for lending opportunities
Collaborate with internal/external organizations

citations.title: Procurement Transparency Dashboard | Richmond

executive_summary.description: A high-level summary of the key findings regarding the City of Richmond's procurement operations, staffing, and MBE/SWaM equity landscape for the 2025-2026 period.

procurement_staff_count.description: The total number of staff positions proposed for the Department of Procurement Services in the City of Richmond's FY2025 budget.

staff_caseload_and_workload_analysis.description: An analysis of the procurement staff's workload, including any available metrics on contracts per person and qualitative information on backlogs and strategic purchasing efforts.

rfp_average_completion_days_fy23.description: The average number of days from initiation to completion for a Request for Proposal (RFP) in FY2023.

rfp_target_completion_days_fy25.description: The target for the average number of days from initiation to completion for an RFP in FY2025.

ifb_average_award_days_fy23.description: The average number of days from advertisement to award for an Invitation for Bid (IFB) in FY2023.

ifb_target_award_days_fy25.description: The target for the average number of days from advertisement to award for an IFB in FY2025.

staff_turnover_and_institutional_knowled.description: Information regarding the staff turnover rate in the procurement department and a qualitative assessment of how employee departures impact institutional knowledge.

minority_spend_percentage_fy22_result.description: The percentage of procurement spending with minority-owned businesses in FY2022.

minority_spend_percentage_fy24_target.description: The target percentage for procurement spending with minority-owned businesses in FY2024.

minority_spend_percentage_fy25_target.description: The target percentage for procurement spending with minority-owned businesses in FY2025.

minority_spend_dollars_fy22_result.description: The total dollar amount of procurement spending with minority-owned businesses in FY2022.

minority_spend_dollars_fy24_target.description: The target dollar amount for procurement spending with minority-owned businesses in FY2024.

minority_spend_dollars_fy25_target.description: The target dollar amount for procurement spending with minority-owned businesses in FY2025.

public_reporting_of_equity_data.description: Details on whether and how the city tracks and publicly reports its MBE/SWaM spending data, including information on the available transparency dashboards and portals.

virginia_state_swam_goal_percentage.description: The statewide goal for Small, Women-owned, and Minority-owned (SWaM) business utilization rate.

virginia_state_swam_goal_source.description: The source document or executive order for the statewide SWaM goal.

richmond_city_mbe_goal_percentage.description: The City of Richmond's target for the percentage of spending with Minority Business Enterprises (MBE).

richmond_city_mbe_goal_source.description: The source document, such as the city budget, for Richmond's MBE spending goal.

richmond_performance_against_equity_goal.description: An assessment of how the City of Richmond's actual MBE/SWaM spending compares to its stated goals and targets.

barriers_for_small_and_minority_vendors.description: An analysis of potential barriers within the current procurement process that may affect small or minority-owned vendors, such as compliance documentation, bonding requirements, or bid complexity.

public_data_release_considerations.description: A discussion of potential privacy concerns, competitive sensitivity issues, or legal constraints that the city must manage when making procurement data public.

planned_procurement_assessment.description: Details about the planned independent assessment of the Department of Procurement Services' business practices and procedures.

p_card_audit_summary.description: Summary of the recent audit of the city's purchasing card (p-card) program and the subsequent 'p-card reset'.

unresolved_audit_issues.description: Information on any high-risk issues found during audits of city departments that have not been fixed, as reported by the City Auditor.

position_title.description: The official title of the position within the Department of Procurement Services.

fy2024_adopted_fte.description: The number of adopted Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) positions for this role in FY2024.

fy2025_proposed_fte.description: The number of proposed Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) positions for this role in FY2025.

initiative_name.description: The name of the initiative for the Department of Procurement Services in FY2025.

description.description: A description of the initiative and its purpose, such as addressing backlogs or improving strategic sourcing.

fte_impact.description: The number of new Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) positions associated with this initiative.

budget_impact_dollars.description: The financial budget allocated to this initiative in dollars.

mission.description: The stated mission of the Office of Minority Business Development (OMBD).

vision.description: The stated vision of the OMBD.

key_objectives.description: A list of the primary objectives for the OMBD, such as increasing technical assistance and identifying procurement opportunities.
